message:
fix(server): return RESP error for unbalanced quotes in inline commands instead of silently truncating

- Change split_inline_args() to return Result, returning Err with a
  protocol error message when double-quoted or single-quoted strings are
  not closed before end of line — previously unbalanced quotes caused
  silent argument truncation, potentially misrouting commands
- Update try_parse_inline() to convert the parse error into a RESP Error
  frame, matching Redis behavior where unbalanced quotes in inline
  commands produce an "-ERR Protocol error: unbalanced quotes" response
- Single-quote path now correctly rejects unclosed quotes with the same
  error instead of silently accepting the partial argument

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
